name: Lemon Grass Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon minced fresh red chili or serrano chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into 1-inch square pieces and place in a medium bowl.
2. Stir in lemon grass, 2 tablespoons of the soy sauce, and salt. Mix well.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 2 hours or longer.
4. Bring to room temperature before cooking.
5. Combine chicken broth, remaining 2 tablespoons of soy sauce, sugar, and chili in another small bowl; set aside.
6. Cut onion into halves lengthwise and then into wedges; separate layers.
7. Heat wok over medium-high heat. Add oil and heat until shimmering.
8. Add minced onion, gingerroot, and garlic; stir-fry for 15 seconds.
9. Increase heat to high.
10. Add chicken; stir-fry for 2 minutes.
11. Add sliced onion; stir-fry for 1 minute.
12. Add chicken broth mixture; cook, stirring, for 1 minute.
13. Stir cornstarch mixture to blend in cornstarch that has settled.
14. Add to the chicken mixture; cook until sauce is thickened, about 30 seconds.
15. Spoon onto a heated platter and serve at once.
